tool.name: 3DTrees: SmartTile
tool.description: Tile, merge and remap point clouds

param.label: Chunk size (points)
param.help: Maximum number of points read per processing chunk. Lower values reduce peak memory but increase overhead.

param.label: Prod-merged resolution (m)
param.help: Target spacing for prod-merged outputs in meters.

param.label: Prod-merged formats
param.help: Select one or more output encodings for prod-merged products.

tool.command:
mkdir -p output_dir &&
#if $operation.task == 'tile': mkdir -p input_dir && #for $f in $operation.input_files: ln -s '$f' 'input_dir/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}' && #end for python -u /src/run.py --task tile --input-dir input_dir --output-dir output_dir --tile-length '$operation.tile_length' --tile-buffer '$operation.tile_buffer' #if $operation.tiling_threshold: --tiling-threshold '$operation.tiling_threshold' #end if --resolution-1 '$operation.resolution_1' --resolution-2 '$operation.resolution_2' --subsampling-method '$operation.subsampling_method' $operation.output_copc_res1 $operation.output_copc_res2 --chunk-size '$operation.chunk_size' --workers 2 --tile-source-workers 2 --tile-writer-workers 2 --num-spatial-chunks "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-4}" --threads "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-4}"
#elif $operation.task == 'merge': mkdir -p input_segmented input_res1 && #for $f in $operation.input_segmented: ln -s '$f' 'input_segmented/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}' && #end for #if $operation.tree_sidecars.mode == 'with_tree_files': #for $f in $operation.tree_sidecars.input_tree_files: ln -s '$f' 'input_segmented/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}' && #end for #end if #for $f in $operation.input_res1: ln -s '$f' 'input_res1/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}' && #end for #if $operation.input_original_laz: mkdir -p input_original_laz && #for $f in $operation.input_original_laz: ln -s '$f' 'input_original_laz/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}' && #end for #end if python -u /src/run.py --task merge --subsampled-segmented-folder input_segmented --subsampled-target-folder input_res1 --tile-bounds-json '$operation.tile_bounds_json' --chunk-size '$operation.chunk_size' --workers 2 --num-spatial-chunks "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-4}" #if $operation.input_original_laz: --original-laz-input-dir input_original_laz --original-laz-output-dir output_dir/original_with_predictions #end if --output-tiles-folder output_dir/output_tiles #if $operation.tree_sidecars.mode == 'with_tree_files': --disable-matching --disable-volume-merge #else #if $operation.tree_sidecars.cross_tile_matching.enabled == 'True': --overlap-threshold '$operation.tree_sidecars.cross_tile_matching.overlap_threshold' --max-centroid-distance '$operation.tree_sidecars.cross_tile_matching.max_centroid_distance' --border-zone-width '$operation.tree_sidecars.cross_tile_matching.border_zone_width' #else --overlap-threshold 0.3 --max-centroid-distance 3.0 --border-zone-width 10.0 --disable-matching #end if #if $operation.tree_sidecars.small_cluster_reassignment.enabled == 'True': --max-volume-for-merge '$operation.tree_sidecars.small_cluster_reassignment.max_volume_for_merge' --min-cluster-size '$operation.tree_sidecars.small_cluster_reassignment.min_cluster_size' #else --max-volume-for-merge 4.0 --min-cluster-size 300 --disable-volume-merge #end if #end if --instance-dimension '$operation.instance_dimension' #if $operation.prod_merged.create == 'True': --transfer-original-dims-to-merged True --output-merged-laz output_dir/merged.laz --merged-resolutions '$operation.prod_merged.merged_resolutions' --merged-output-formats '$operation.prod_merged.merged_output_formats' #else --skip-merged-file --no-transfer-original-dims-to-merged #end if
#elif $operation.task == 'remap': mkdir -p input_original_laz output_dir/original_with_predictions && #for $f in $operation.original_files: ln -s '$f' 'input_original_laz/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}' && #end for #if $operation.remap_source.source == 'merged_file': #if $operation.remap_source.merged_file_is_copc: ln -s '$operation.remap_source.merged_file' merged_input.copc.laz && #else ln -s '$operation.remap_source.merged_file' merged_input.laz && #end if #else mkdir -p input_prediction_collections && segmented_folders="" && collection_idx=0 && #for $seg in $operation.remap_source.segmented_collections: collection_dir="input_prediction_collections/collection_\${collection_idx}" && mkdir -p "\$collection_dir" && #for $f in $seg.collection: ln -s '$f' "\$collection_dir/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}" && #end for if [ -z "\$segmented_folders" ]; then segmented_folders="\$collection_dir"; else segmented_folders="\$segmented_folders,\$collection_dir"; fi && collection_idx=\$((collection_idx + 1)) && #end for #end if python -u /src/run.py --task remap #if $operation.remap_source.source == 'merged_file': #if $operation.remap_source.merged_file_is_copc: --merged-laz merged_input.copc.laz #else --merged-laz merged_input.laz #end if #else --segmented-folders "\$segmented_folders" #if $operation.remap_source.remap_dims: --remap-dims '$operation.remap_source.remap_dims' #end if #end if --original-laz-input-dir input_original_laz --original-laz-output-dir output_dir/original_with_predictions --workers 2 --num-spatial-chunks "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-4}" #if $operation.prod_merged.create == 'True': --transfer-original-dims-to-merged True --merged-resolutions '$operation.prod_merged.merged_resolutions' --merged-output-formats '$operation.prod_merged.merged_output_formats' #else --no-transfer-original-dims-to-merged #end if --chunk-size '$operation.chunk_size'
#elif $operation.task == 'create_merged_file': mkdir -p original_with_predictions && #for $f in $operation.original_with_predictions: ln -s '$f' 'original_with_predictions/${f.element_identifier}.${f.ext}' && #end for python -u /src/run.py --task create_merged_file --original-with-predictions-dir original_with_predictions --output-dir output_dir --merged-resolutions '$operation.merged_resolutions' --merged-output-formats '$operation.merged_output_formats' --workers 2 --num-spatial-chunks "\${GALAXY_SLOTS:-4}" #end if

param.name: input_files
param.label: Input LAZ/LAS files
param.help: One or more source point clouds to tile and subsample.

param.label: Tile length (m)
param.help: Target tile edge length in meters.

param.label: Tile buffer (m)
param.help: Overlap added around each tile in meters.

param.label: Tiling threshold (MB)
param.help: Skip tiling for a single input below this size and still create normalized subsampled outputs.

param.label: Resolution 1 (m)
param.help: Fine subsampling resolution in meters.

param.label: Resolution 2 (m)
param.help: Coarse subsampling resolution in meters.

param.label: Subsampling method
param.help: Point representative used when reducing each voxel.

param.label: Write resolution 1 as COPC LAZ
param.help: Return the fine-resolution subsampled collection as COPC LAZ.

param.label: Write resolution 2 as COPC LAZ
param.help: Return the coarse-resolution subsampled collection as COPC LAZ.

param.name: input_segmented
param.label: Primary segmented files
param.help: Segmented prediction files at the same tile layout as the target-resolution subsampled files.

param.name: input_res1
param.label: Target-resolution subsampled files
param.help: Subsampled target files used as the merge geometry reference.

param.name: input_original_laz
param.label: Original LAZ/LAS files
param.help: Original uploaded files to enrich with predictions and use for prod-merged outputs.

param.name: tile_bounds_json
param.label: Tile bounds JSON
param.help: Tile bounds JSON emitted by the tile task for the same tiling run.

param.label: Instance dimension
param.help: Name of the prediction instance dimension in segmented inputs.

validator.message: Use letters, numbers, and underscores only; start with a letter or underscore.

param.name: mode
param.label: Tree sidecar files
param.help: Optionally pass RayCloudTools text sidecars through the same filtering step as the segmented point clouds.

param.name: enabled
param.label: Cross-tile merging
param.help: Merge matching instances that cross tile boundaries.

param.label: Overlap threshold
param.help: Minimum overlap ratio for cross-tile instance matching.

param.label: Max centroid distance (m)
param.help: Maximum centroid distance for cross-tile instance matching.

param.label: Border zone width (m)
param.help: Candidate band around tile-core edges; separate from the tile buffer in the tile bounds JSON.

param.name: enabled
param.label: Small cluster reassignment
param.help: Reassign small clusters to nearby larger instances.

param.label: Max volume for reassignment (m3)
param.help: Clusters below this volume are eligible for reassignment.

param.label: Minimum cluster size
param.help: Clusters below this point count are eligible for reassignment.

param.name: input_tree_files
param.label: Tree files from 3dtrees_raycloudtools
param.help: Use the *_trees.txt and *_trees_info.txt files emitted by 3dtrees_raycloudtools for the primary segmented files.

param.name: merged_file
param.label: Merged LAZ/COPC LAZ file
param.help: Single merged prediction file whose extra dimensions should be transferred to originals.

param.name: merged_file_is_copc
param.label: Merged file is COPC LAZ
param.help: Preserve the .copc.laz suffix for tools that infer COPC status from the file name.

param.name: collection
param.label: Segmented files collection
param.help: Collection of segmented prediction files to remap back to original files.

param.label: Dimension allowlist
param.help: Comma-separated extra dimensions to transfer; empty transfers all extra dimensions.

validator.message: Use comma-separated dimension names containing only letters, numbers, and underscores.

param.name: original_files
param.label: Original LAZ/LAS files
param.help: Original uploaded files to enrich with remapped prediction dimensions.

param.name: original_with_predictions
param.label: Original-with-predictions files
param.help: Original files that already contain prediction dimensions.

param.label: Output formats
param.help: Select one or more output encodings for prod-merged products.

collection.name: prod_merged_outputs
collection.label: ${tool.name}: Prod-merged LAZ/COPC products
collection.filter: (operation['task'] == "create_merged_file" and ("laz" in operation['merged_output_formats'] or "copc.laz" in operation['merged_output_formats'])) or (operation['task'] == "remap" and operation['prod_merged']['create'] == "True" and ("laz" in operation['prod_merged']['merged_output_formats'] or "copc.laz" in operation['prod_merged']['merged_output_formats'])) or (operation['task'] == "merge" and operation['prod_merged']['create'] == "True" and operation['input_original_laz'] and ("laz" in operation['prod_merged']['merged_output_formats'] or "copc.laz" in operation['prod_merged']['merged_output_formats']))

collection.name: prod_merged_ply_outputs
collection.label: ${tool.name}: Prod-merged PLY products
collection.filter: (operation['task'] == "create_merged_file" and "ply" in operation['merged_output_formats']) or (operation['task'] == "remap" and operation['prod_merged']['create'] == "True" and "ply" in operation['prod_merged']['merged_output_formats']) or (operation['task'] == "merge" and operation['prod_merged']['create'] == "True" and operation['input_original_laz'] and "ply" in operation['prod_merged']['merged_output_formats'])

tool.help:
SmartTile prepares and post-processes point-cloud predictions for the 3Dtrees workflow. Select one task according to the stage of processing you want to run.
**Tile and subsample**
Splits one or more LAZ/LAS point clouds into buffered spatial tiles and writes two subsampled collections. The tile task also writes a tiling preview image and a tile bounds JSON file. Use the tile bounds JSON with the merge task so SmartTile can identify tile cores and buffers consistently.
**Filter/Merge segmented tiles**
Filters predictions back to tile cores, optionally matches instances across neighboring tiles, optionally reassigns small clusters, and writes merged target-resolution tiles. Provide the segmented prediction files, the target-resolution subsampled files, and the tile bounds JSON from the matching tiling run. If 3dtrees_raycloudtools tree sidecar files are supplied, SmartTile filters and returns those text files while keeping tile-local instance IDs; cross-tile matching and small-cluster reassignment are disabled for that mode.
When original LAZ/LAS files are provided, the merge task can also transfer predictions back to the originals and create prod-merged products.
**Remap predictions to originals**
Transfers prediction dimensions from either one merged prediction file or one or more segmented prediction collections back onto the original uploaded LAZ/LAS files. Use the dimension allowlist only when you want to copy a selected set of prediction dimensions from segmented collections.
**Create prod-merged file**
Creates delivery-ready products from original-with-prediction files that already contain prediction dimensions. Prod-merged outputs can be LAZ, COPC LAZ, or binary PLY. COPC LAZ is selected with the format value `copc.laz` and is returned to Galaxy as `laz`; PLY is returned as `plybinary`.

citations.citation: @misc{3dtrees_smart_tile, title = {3D Trees SmartTile Tool}, author = {3D Trees Project}, year = {2026}}
